backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing OTP-based authentication with mobile numbers, user profiles, subjects, chapters, study time tracking, daily goals, and role-based access control using MixinAuthorization.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old actor state (Principal-keyed with email profiles) to new actor state (Nat-keyed with mobile number profiles), currently returning empty maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features for replacing Internet Identity with mobile OTP login, including UI redesign, OTP verification screen, signup form, and authentication hook replacement.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and utilities for the Tracky syllabus tracking application with OTP authentication.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives defining OKLCH-based color system for light and dark modes with custom CSS variables for UI theming.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Tracky application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component with TanStack Router setup, protected route wrapper using OTP authentication, automatic profile setup handling, and route definitions for login, dashboard, syllabus tracker, and subjects pages.
frontend/src/components/ChapterList.tsx: Displays a list of chapters grouped by completion status (incomplete/completed) with checkboxes to toggle status, study time display, and optional chapter selection for tracking.
frontend/src/components/ChapterStatsCard: Card component that displays chapter statistics showing completed and pending chapter counts with icons and a total count.
frontend/src/components/DashboardStopwat: Stopwatch component with start, pause, resume, and stop functionality, displaying elapsed time in HH:MM:SS format.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with header containing logo, navigation (Dashboard, Subjects, Syllabus Tracker), user info, and logout button with responsive mobile navigation.
frontend/src/components/MotivationalQuot: Displays a daily motivational quote selected based on the day of the year from a predefined list of 20 quotes.
frontend/src/components/ProgressCard.tsx: Card component showing overall progress percentage across all subjects with a progress bar visualization.
frontend/src/components/ProgressReport.t: Comprehensive progress report card displaying total subjects, chapters (total/completed/pending), and overall completion percentage with progress bar.
frontend/src/components/StudyGoalCard.ts: Card for setting and tracking daily study goals in minutes, showing progress toward the goal with a progress bar and celebration message when reached.
frontend/src/components/StudyTimeCard.ts: Displays a card showing total accumulated study time across all subjects, formatted using a utility function and styled with a clock icon.
frontend/src/components/StudyTimer.tsx: A timer component that tracks study sessions for a selected chapter, with start/pause/resume/stop controls and saves elapsed time to the backend via mutation.
frontend/src/components/SubjectCard.tsx: Displays a subject card with name, creation date, and progress percentage with a visual progress bar fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity management, and status tracking using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useOTPAuth.tsx: Provides OTP-based authentication context with mobile number storage in localStorage, managing login state and authentication status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including OTP auth, user profiles, subjects, chapters, and study time tracking with proper cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom blue-and-white theme variables for light and dark modes, plus typography and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page that displays progress cards, study time, chapter stats, motivational quotes, and a stopwatch using data from multiple query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Multi-step authentication page handling mobile OTP login flow with three states: mobile entry, OTP verification, and new user signup with profile creation.
frontend/src/pages/SubjectsPage.tsx: Page for managing subjects with a form to add new subjects and a grid display of existing subjects using SubjectCard components.
frontend/src/pages/SyllabusTrackerPage.t: Page for tracking syllabus chapters by subject, featuring subject selection, chapter addition form, study timer, study goal card, and chapter list display.
frontend/src/utils/timeFormatters.ts: Utility functions to format study time in minutes to readable strings in both short format (2h 30m) and long format (2 hours 30 minutes).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings, custom animations, and plugin integrations for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state file for 'Tracky', a student productivity app with OTP-based authentication, subject/chapter tracking, study timers, and progress reporting. Contains architectural notes, existing features list, and schema version tracking.
